summary: Iteration 65 - NeXify AI Master Chat Interface Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified all 16 features: Backend APIs (status, conversations, chat streaming, memory search, delete), auth requirements (401 without token), frontend UI (nav item first position, chat view, brain toggle, quick actions, status bar, message sending, streaming response), and regression tests (API keys, legal pages).
seed_data_creation: Created test conversations during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: NeXify AI Master chat interface fully tested and working. Arcee AI (trinity-large-preview) streaming works correctly. mem0 Brain integration active. All UI elements present and functional. Chat creates conversations, streams responses, and persists to MongoDB.

backend_status_endpoint.response: Returns arcee (configured=true, model=trinity-large-preview), mem0 (configured=true), stats (conversations, messages counts)

backend_conversations_list.response: Returns conversations array with conversation_id, title, created_at, updated_at, message_count

backend_chat_streaming.response: SSE streaming (text/event-stream), creates conversation, streams content chunks, returns done signal

backend_memory_search.response: Returns memories array and count from mem0 brain

backend_conversation_delete.response: Returns deleted: true, removes conversation and messages

frontend_nav_item_position.details: NeXify AI is the FIRST item in admin sidebar with psychology icon

frontend_brain_toggle.details: Shows 'Brain aktiv' when enabled, clickable to toggle state

frontend_send_message.details: User message appears in chat, AI response streams in (tested with '2+2' question, received '4.' response)

frontend_conversation_sidebar.details: Conversation appears in sidebar after sending first message with title and message count

frontend_new_chat_button.details: Clears messages and resets conversation state

mocked_apis.note: Arcee AI and mem0 are real live integrations

playwright_test_results.nexify_ai_navigation: PASS - First item in sidebar with psychology icon
playwright_test_results.chat_view_elements: PASS - All 7 elements found and visible
playwright_test_results.status_bar: PASS - Shows Arcee trinity-large-preview | mem0 Brain aktiv
playwright_test_results.send_message: PASS - Message sent, AI response received ('4.')
playwright_test_results.conversation_sidebar: PASS - Conversation appeared with title and message count
